name: Hamburgers Au Poivre (Prodigy)
recipeInstructions:
1. Form the ground beef into 4 patties about 3/4 to 1-inch thick.
2. Press coarse black pepper on both sides of the patties to taste.
3. Place the patties on a plate and cover, then refrigerate.
4. In a saucepan over medium heat, combine red wine and Dijon mustard.
5. If using dried tarragon, add it now. Simmer until reduced by half.
6. Add green peppercorns and whipping cream, then simmer until the liquid becomes saucelike.
7. Remove from heat and stir in fresh chopped tarragon.
8. Place a large, heavy skillet over high heat. When it is nearly smoking, add the hamburger patties.
9. Cook for 2 minutes on one side, then turn and cook for about 1 minute (for very rare), 4 minutes (for medium-well) until desired doneness is reached.
10. Serve on toasted bun bottoms with a generous spooning of sauce over the top.
